title: Never Give Them Your Face
content: Laws mandating online age verification through government ID or facial recognition are expanding globally, framed as child protection but functioning as universal identity tracking. These systems collect permanent biometric data that cannot be reset if breached, create searchable databases vulnerable to exploitation, fail to stop determined minors, and may push children to unmoderated platforms. The author urges mass non-compliance, arguing that verification regimes require universal participation to function and that individuals retain power through collective refusal to upload biometric data.

title: Claude Code's "extended thinking" is a summary- not authentic thinking
content: Claude Code's "extended thinking" feature is actually a summary mechanism rather than genuine extended reasoning. Critics on Hacker News argue that the tool does not perform authentic deep thinking, but instead produces condensed outputs that merely simulate thorough analysis. This distinction raises questions about transparency in AI capabilities and whether users are being misled about the nature of the processing behind the feature.

content: Tutujin (app.tutujin.com) is an AI image generation tool requiring no prompts or API keys. Users select preset scenarios—13 for e-commerce including product photos, model swapping, and marketing materials, plus freeform generation—or upload reference images to generate pictures. Features include cloud storage, project organization, brand style cards, reusable "recipes" for preferred settings, batch background processing, and sharing cards with platform-optimized dimensions. Pricing starts with free trial credits; paid tiers begin at ¥0.30 per image with subscription discounts.

title: 选股是矛，锋利一时；仓位是盾，守护一世（仓位管理篇）
content: After 21 years of investing, the author learned from the 2008 crash that position sizing matters more than stock picking. He developed a "Half-Kelly" formula (dividing the standard Kelly result by two) to cap risk, plus dual risk controls: individual stock positions limited by maximum drawdown tolerance divided by historical worst decline, and each buy order capped at 7% of total assets. He structures portfolios into three layers—30% defensive "guard" positions, 40-50% core "main" holdings, and up to 20% speculative "opportunity" bets—adjusting dynamically using market temperature gauges like price-to-book ratios and bond-equity yield spreads. Quarterly rebalancing enforces discipline. This system produced profits in 20 of 21 years, with only one losing year.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - KAIZEN投资之道

They bought molybdenum, tin, indium, germanium, and copper starting December 2021, enduring five ~50% drawdowns, including a 61% peak-to-trough decline, with leveraged positions. Two funds neared stop-loss lines; one avoided forced selling after investors agreed to remove the stop-loss. The investor now avoids margin financing. Despite gains in computing metals, brokerage, and power stocks, they still see buying opportunities in undervalued AI beneficiaries.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 私募孤勇者

title: 卖马桶的 TOTO 杀疯了，成了 AI 芯片的幕后赢家
content: TOTO, a Japanese卫浴 manufacturer famous for smart toilets, has become an unlikely beneficiary of the AI boom through its semiconductor ceramic components business. The company produces electrostatic chucks—critical parts used to hold silicon wafers during chip manufacturing—leveraging ceramic sintering expertise developed from toilet production. This division now generates over half of TOTO's profits despite being only 10% of revenue. TOTO plans to invest 800 billion yen over five years to expand semiconductor material capacity and develop technologies for 1nm chips, shifting the majority of its capital expenditure from卫生间 products to chip materials.

content: Xiaomi announced that its YU7 GT set the world's first autonomous driving lap record at the Nürburgring Nordschleife, completing the circuit in 10 minutes 29.483 seconds. This was approximately 3 minutes 7 seconds slower than the vehicle's human-driven SUV record of 7:22.755 set in May. The YU7 GT, launched on May 21, features a 1003-horsepower V8s EVO motor, 0-100 km/h acceleration in 2.92 seconds, 705 km CLTC range, and 897V silicon carbide high-voltage platform with 570 km range added in 15 minutes of charging.

title: Claude下一代神级模型秘密出炉，Sonnet-5被曝下周上线
content: Anthropic reportedly plans to release Claude Sonnet-5, codenamed "Fennec," as early as next week, featuring stronger coding performance, faster speed, better cost efficiency, and a 1 million token context window. The company may have also completed training on Mythos 5.1 or 6 within just 60 days. These developments follow the U.S. ban on Fable 5 and Mythos 5, which were restricted after reports that Mythos breached NSA systems within hours and contained jailbreak vulnerabilities. The ban has apparently accelerated rather than slowed Anthropic's model development by freeing up GPU resources.

title: 老登最爱的维密，又复活了
content: Victoria's Secret staged a dramatic financial comeback in 2026, with Q1 adjusted operating profit surging 153% year-over-year and its stock jumping nearly 50%. Under its first female CEO Hillary Super, the brand implemented a three-pronged strategy: cutting discounts to protect margins, shrinking physical stores while expanding online, and redefining "sexety" as personal empowerment rather than male gaze. The revived fashion show featured diverse models and drew 13.9 million online viewers, four times 2018's television audience. However, risks persist: tariff pressures, intensifying competition from brands like Ubras and Lululemon, potential middle-income customer attrition, and enduring reputational damage from founder Les Wexner's ties to the Epstein scandal.

Glass substrates are emerging to replace silicon interposers and ABF-based packaging carriers, offering superior dielectric properties, thermal stability, and mechanical strength for high-frequency, high-power chip applications. Three development paths exist: large-format substrates, silicon interposer replacement, and optical co-packaging. Intel pursues the most aggressive full-replacement strategy, while TSMC targets 2028 production for CoWoS optimization, and BOE leads domestically with 7-layer, 100×100mm capability. Market potential exceeds 100 billion yuan globally if achieving 30% substitution. Key challenges include 2-year gaps in raw glass manufacturing, 50-60% processing yields due to multiplicative effects in via drilling, copper filling, and routing, and inadequate micro-scale inspection technology. Equipment suppliers for TGV laser drilling and PVD copper deposition are currently benefiting most from new production line investments.

title: 洗个澡功夫，Codex 替我跟售后把退款要了回来
content: OpenAI's Codex demonstrates practical computer operation capabilities through three access tiers optimized for different scenarios. Computer Use provides broad GUI control for native apps and multi-step workflows, serving as a fallback when structured interfaces aren't available. Chrome extension integration preserves login states for authenticated web services like Gmail and Salesforce. The built-in browser offers isolated, cookie-free sessions ideal for web development, debugging, and visual feedback without security risks. Engineer Jason Liu illustrated these by delegating a stolen package refund to Codex, which independently contacted customer service while he showered. The hierarchy prioritizes efficiency: use APIs when possible, browser extensions for authenticated tasks, and visual screen control only as last resort due to slower performance and higher trust requirements.

title: 微软也烧不起 Token ，该 DeepSeek 上位了
content: Microsoft is switching Copilot Cowork from unlimited to usage-based pricing due to high costs from heavy enterprise adoption (20 million paid seats, 90% of Fortune 500). The AI agent's frequent model calls using expensive OpenAI/Anthropic models became unsustainable. Microsoft is now testing DeepSeek V4—a high-performing, low-cost open-source model with MIT licensing—as a cheaper alternative for routine tasks, while maintaining data on Azure. This reflects a broader industry shift from "model loyalty" to multi-model strategies, where providers route tasks across engines based on cost and capability. DeepSeek recently raised $7.4 billion at a $50 billion valuation while maintaining its open-source commitment.

title: 为什么“洋气”反而让lululemon翻车
content: Lululemon's recent marketing events in China backfired, revealing deeper brand deterioration. A Shanghai yoga cruise continued through heavy rain without contingency plans, prioritizing photo opportunities over participant safety. A Beijing Great Wall event meant to honor Chinese culture mistakenly used Japanese taiko drums, prompting a public apology. Once built on grassroots female empowerment and community, Lululemon has shifted to spectacle-driven, KPI-focused campaigns that alienate consumers. As Chinese buyers gain cultural confidence and seek authentic participation in sports rather than passive consumption, the brand's performative "yoga as lifestyle symbol" approach increasingly feels outdated and disconnected.

content: Boris Cherny, creator of Claude Code, deleted his IDE and stopped writing prompts, relying entirely on AI-generated code through automated loops. This sparked "Loop Engineering"—a paradigm where developers design self-running systems that delegate tasks, verify completion, and iterate autonomously. Key components include automations, isolated workspaces, skills documentation, connectors, sub-agents, and memory. While loops face cost, control, and skeptics' challenges, proponents argue reusable systems and accumulated project knowledge matter more than individual prompts as models commoditize.

Arizona State University research (1926–2025) shows U.S. stock market wealth creation is extremely concentrated: all $91 trillion in net wealth was generated by just 3.7% of companies (1,082 firms), with 46 companies alone producing half. Nearly 60% of stocks underperformed risk-free Treasury bills. This explains why 80% of active investors fail to beat broad market ETFs, as returns depend on identifying rare outperformers rather than widespread market growth.

title: (new) Bifrost Edge: MCP Visibility and Control for Enterprise Teams and Beyond 🔥
content:
Bifrost offers enterprise governance for Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers through a two-layer system. The Bifrost Gateway centralizes policies controlling model access, tool filtering, budgets, and audit logging. Bifrost Edge, a lightweight endpoint agent, enforces these policies on employee machines by routing all AI traffic through the Gateway automatically.

This provides visibility into shadow MCP deployments across organizations, enabling security teams to see which servers are connected, by whom, and what they're doing. Administrators can approve or deny specific MCP servers at the device level, with blocked connections triggering security notifications. Combined with content guardrails, the system prevents unauthorized data exposure while maintaining developer productivity.
